title: Malliswari
writer: Buchi Babu, Devulapalli Venkata Krishna Sastri
actors: Doraiswamy, Subba Rao K.V., Surabhi Kamalabai
plot: Nagaraju and Malliswari want to get married. The mother of Malliswari, Nagamma, sends her to rani vasam at Krishnadevaraya palace. Nagaraju tries to get her back at the risk of getting beheaded if caught in the palace.
